title: leucanthemopsis pallida subsp. virescens
intro: Leucanthemopsis pallida subsp. virescens, also known as green alpine daisy, is a rare alpine plant species that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leucanthemopsis pallida subsp. virescens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
